section.title: DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion Class Reference

para.para: Shortcuts/functions that are not strictly related to specific Modules but are available only on some Unity versions.

listitem.para: static Sequence DOGradientColor (this Material target, Gradient gradient, float duration)
Tweens a Material's color using the given gradient (NOTE 1: only uses the colors of the gradient, not the alphas - NOTE 2: creates a Sequence, not a Tweener).
static Sequence DOGradientColor (this Material target, Gradient gradient, string property, float duration)
Tweens a Material's named color property using the given gradient (NOTE 1: only uses the colors of the gradient, not the alphas - NOTE 2: creates a Sequence, not a Tweener).
static CustomYieldInstruction WaitForCompletion (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or complete.
static CustomYieldInstruction WaitForRewind (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or rewinded.
static CustomYieldInstruction WaitForKill (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed.
static CustomYieldInstruction WaitForElapsedLoops (this Tween t, int elapsedLoops, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or has gone through the given amount of loops.
static CustomYieldInstruction WaitForPosition (this Tween t, float position, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or has reached the given time position (loops included, delays excluded).
static CustomYieldInstruction WaitForStart (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or started (meaning when the tween is set in a playing state the first time, after any eventual delay).

section.title: Detailed Description
section.para: Shortcuts/functions that are not strictly related to specific Modules but are available only on some Unity versions.

section.section:
Member Function Documentation
DOGradientColor()[1/2] DOGradientColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionDOGradientColor
Sequence DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.DOGradientColor (this Material target, Gradient gradient, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Material's color using the given gradient (NOTE 1: only uses the colors of the gradient, not the alphas - NOTE 2: creates a Sequence, not a Tweener).
Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
gradient
The gradient to use
duration
The duration of the tween
DOGradientColor()[2/2] DOGradientColorDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionDOGradientColor
Sequence DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.DOGradientColor (this Material target, Gradient gradient, string property, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Material's named color property using the given gradient (NOTE 1: only uses the colors of the gradient, not the alphas - NOTE 2: creates a Sequence, not a Tweener).
Also stores the image as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
gradient
The gradient to use
property
The name of the material property to tween (like _Tint or _SpecColor)
duration
The duration of the tween
WaitForCompletion() WaitForCompletionDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionWaitForCompletion
CustomYieldInstruction DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.WaitForCompletion (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)[static]
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or complete.
It can be used inside a coroutine as a yield.
Example usage:
yield return myTween.WaitForCompletion(true);
WaitForElapsedLoops() WaitForElapsedLoopsDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionWaitForElapsedLoops
CustomYieldInstruction DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.WaitForElapsedLoops (this Tween t, int elapsedLoops, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)[static]
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or has gone through the given amount of loops.
It can be used inside a coroutine as a yield.
Example usage:
yield return myTween.WaitForElapsedLoops(2);
Parameters
elapsedLoops
Elapsed loops to wait for
WaitForKill() WaitForKillDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionWaitForKill
CustomYieldInstruction DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.WaitForKill (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)[static]
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed.
It can be used inside a coroutine as a yield.
Example usage:
yield return myTween.WaitForKill();
WaitForPosition() WaitForPositionDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionWaitForPosition
CustomYieldInstruction DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.WaitForPosition (this Tween t, float position, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)[static]
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or has reached the given time position (loops included, delays excluded).
It can be used inside a coroutine as a yield.
Example usage:
yield return myTween.WaitForPosition(2.5f);
Parameters
position
Position (loops included, delays excluded) to wait for
WaitForRewind() WaitForRewindDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionWaitForRewind
CustomYieldInstruction DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.WaitForRewind (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)[static]
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or rewinded.
It can be used inside a coroutine as a yield.
Example usage:
yield return myTween.WaitForRewind();
WaitForStart() WaitForStartDG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersionWaitForStart
CustomYieldInstruction DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUnityVersion.WaitForStart (this Tween t, bool returnCustomYieldInstruction)[static]
Returns a CustomYieldInstruction that waits until the tween is killed or started (meaning when the tween is set in a playing state the first time, after any eventual delay).
It can be used inside a coroutine as a yield.
Example usage:
yield return myTween.WaitForStart();
